records.ety: [L. propellere, propulsum; pro forward + pellere to drive. See Pulse a beating.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Propelled (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Propelling.]

defs: To drive forward; to urge or press onward by force; to move, or cause to move; as, the wind or steam propels ships; balls are propelled by gunpowder.
